claimText: CAFE-3 norms will be effective from April 1, 2027, to March 31, 2032.
evidenceExcerpt: CAFE-3 norms will come into force from 1st April 2027 until 31st March 2032.
examUse: Statement-based question on the implementation timeline of CAFE-3 norms.

claimText: CAFE norms apply to passenger cars with a seating capacity not exceeding 9 persons and a gross vehicle weight not exceeding 3,500 kg.
evidenceExcerpt: CAFE norms apply to passenger cars with a seating capacity not exceeding 9 persons and a gross vehicle weight not exceeding 3,500 kg.
examUse: Statement-based question on the applicability criteria of CAFE norms.

claimText: The Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE) was established under the legislative framework of the Energy Conservation Act 2001.
evidenceExcerpt: BEE was established under the legislative framework of the Energy Conservation Act 2001.
examUse: Institution-feature question regarding the statutory backing of BEE.
distractorHooks: Established under the Environment Protection Act 1986
It is an executive body without statutory backing

claimText: The State Energy Efficiency Index (SEEI) 2024 was developed by the Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE) in collaboration with the Alliance for an Energy Efficient Economy.
evidenceExcerpt: The State Energy Efficiency Index (SEEI) 2024 was developed by BEE in collaboration with the Alliance for an Energy Efficient Economy.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question on the publishers of major indices.
distractorHooks: Published by the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE)
Published by the International Energy Agency (IEA)
